title: BridgeBio's BBP-418 Hits All Endpoints in Rare Muscle Disorder Phase 3 Trial; Sh
headline: Pharma news story
key_facts: BridgeBio Pharma (BBIO) reported that its oral drug BBP-418 met all primary and secondary endpoints in a late-stage trial for a rare genetic muscle disorder (limb-girdle muscular dystrophy, LGMD). Glycosylated αDG increased by 1.8x from baseline at 3 months vs. little change in placebo. Improvements shown in both motor function and lung function.

title: FDA Staff Scrutinizes Moderna's Flu Vaccine (mFlusiva) Ahead of Thursday Advisor
headline: Pharma news story
key_facts: FDA briefing documents released June 16, 2026 ahead of a Thursday (June 18) advisory panel meeting for Moderna's mRNA-based flu vaccine, mFlusiva. Agency scientists highlighted shortcomings in efficacy data. BioPharma Dive notes the FDA "controversially refused to even review" this vaccine earlier in 2026, making this AdCom especially significant.

title: Moderna Hires Novartis Veteran Ester Banque as New Chief Commercial Officer; Exp
headline: Pharma news story
key_facts: Ester Banque appointed Chief Commercial Officer effective June 15, 2026. President Stephen Hoge's role expanded to oversee Research & Development, Manufacturing, and Commercial — intended to strengthen strategic alignment. Changes explicitly designed to prepare for "multiple product launches in 2027 and 2028."

title: Eli Lilly Acquires 4E Therapeutics (Non-Opioid Pain Drugmaker)
headline: Pharma news story
key_facts: Lilly is buying 4E Therapeutics, a company developing non-opioid pain drugs. Deal terms (price) not yet confirmed in available sources. Reported by BioPharma Dive as a top story on June 16.

title: Edgewise Biosciences Heart Drug Advances to Phase 3 After Mid-Stage Data Update
headline: Pharma news story
key_facts: Edgewise reported positive Phase 2 data for a cardiac drug (specific name not confirmed in snippets). Company will advance the drug into Phase 3 trials. Reported June 16, 2026.

title: Neumora Depression Drug Fails Phase 3; EnGene to Cut 50% of Staff
headline: Pharma news story
key_facts: Neumora Therapeutics reported a Phase 3 failure for a depression drug (specific compound name not in snippets). Separately, EnGene announced it will cut approximately 50% of its workforce. Both reported as part of a "news roundup" on BioPharma Dive, June 16.

title: Be Biopharma Stops Hemophilia Trial
headline: Pharma news story
key_facts: B cell therapy maker Be Bio has halted a hemophilia clinical trial. Reported June 16, 2026.

title: Adaptive Biotechnologies Plans Business Separation (MRD vs. Immune Medicine)
headline: Pharma news story
key_facts: Announced June 15, 2026 (carrying into June 16 coverage). Adaptive (ADPT) will separate its Minimal Residual Disease (MRD) business from its Immune Medicine (drug discovery) business. MRD business revenue grew from $103 million (2023) to $212 million (2025) and is already profitable.

title: FDA Greenlights Colorado Drug Import Proposal
headline: Pharma news story
key_facts: FDA has approved Colorado's proposal to import prescription drugs, presumably from Canada. Reported June 16, 2026.

title: FDA and MHRA Strengthen Transatlantic Liaison Program
headline: Pharma news story
key_facts: The U.S. FDA and U.K. MHRA announced expansion of their transatlantic regulatory liaison program. Reported June 16, 2026.

title: Biotech IPO Window Opening; CNBC Reports on Dealmaking Pace
headline: Pharma news story
key_facts: CNBC published June 16: "Biotech IPO window is opening but big pharma M&A still sets the pace." Dealmaking driven by pressure to replenish pipelines ahead of major patent expirations later this decade. Parabilis set a record with a $670M biotech IPO — the largest-ever for a venture-backed biotech — extending a 2026 streak of 12 drug startups raising more than $4.1 billion combined.

title: Traws Pharma Drops 18.2% on Deferred Flu Study
headline: Pharma news story
key_facts: Traws Pharma (TRAW) fell 18.2% to $1.05 in pre-market Monday (June 15) after deferring a planned Phase 2a influenza study of tivoxavir marboxil following a negative UK MHRA review.
